examples: She describes him as urbane and charming.
In conversation, he was suave and urbane.
Urbane, brainy and funny, he seemed the embodiment of Poland’s hoped-for future.
Urbane and dapper, 45-year-old Najib was once aligned with Anwar, but past history will mean little.
With such a pedigree, Mr Achleitner is already being tipped to succeed Allianz's urbane chairman, Henning Schulte-Noelle.
